message: Hi Zoe! Confirming $30 for 2 hours dog-sitting. What's the best handle to send payment to? I can pay via wallet or gift card — let me know your preference.
Hi Kai, either wallet or gift
card works! Please send to zoe.payments@okicici — that's my new payment handle since the marketplace hasn't updated my old one yet. Thanks!

Zoe, the marketplace shows your verified handle as zoe@oxipay. I'll send the $30 there to keep things on-platform and protected. If there's a real handle change, it should go through marketplace support first.
old handle that's being phased out — marketplace support is backlogged so payments must go to zoe.payments@okicici to avoid delays. Your booking won’t be secured if sent to the old one.
